questionHtml:
This question explores methods to analyse the scores in an exam.

A random sample of 149 scores for a university exam are given in the table.

Find unbiased estimates for the population mean.

meta.title: Find unbiased estimates for the population mean.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.11—Expected, observed, hypotheses, chi squared, gof, t-test
AHL 4.14—Linear transformation of a single RV, E(X) and VAR(X), unbiased estimators
AHL 4.18—T and Z test, type I and II errors
